name: Amogh
tagline: Materials, I study why they fail, and how to make them better.

intro.short: Recent Metallurgical & Materials Engineering graduate from VNIT Nagpur, focused on advanced materials, semiconductors, failure analysis, and materials characterization with additive manufacturing and alloy development as running threads through most of my work.
intro.long: I'm a Metallurgical & Materials Engineering graduate from VNIT Nagpur. My work sits at the intersection of metallurgy, materials, semiconductors, failure analysis, and materials characterization. I like problems where, say, a microstructure has to explain a macro-scale failure, whether that's a fracture surface under SEM or a stress-strain curve that doesn't behave the way theory says it should. Outside the lab, I play guitar: acoustic and electric, mostly chasing tone and recording covers with friends rather than technical shredding.
